title: Company Overview
content: The Chain Technologies builds autonomous business intelligence that communicates, negotiates and executes work on behalf of businesses. The company's first product is Val, an AI Negotiating Receptionist.

title: Val
content: Val is an AI-powered negotiating receptionist that answers customer questions, qualifies leads, recommends services, books appointments and communicates naturally with customers 24 hours a day. Val is designed to become the intelligent front desk for businesses.

title: Negotiation Engine
content: The Negotiation Engine is the intelligence behind Val. It understands business objectives, pricing strategies, customer behaviour and negotiation rules to help businesses communicate and negotiate consistently.

title: Future Technologies
content: The Chain Technologies is also developing Voice AI, Automation Hub, Business Brain, Ownership Protocol and an AI-powered Marketplace. These are future products and should never be presented as currently available unless explicitly marked as available.

title: Mission
content: The mission of The Chain Technologies is to build autonomous business intelligence that eliminates repetitive work, improves customer experience and gives every business access to an intelligent digital workforce.

title: Vision
content: The long-term vision is an Autonomous Business Operating System where AI communicates, negotiates, executes workflows and manages business operations alongside humans.

title: Why Businesses Choose Val
content: Val is available 24/7, responds instantly, qualifies leads, books appointments, negotiates within business rules, supports multiple languages and helps businesses reduce front desk workload while improving customer responsiveness.

title: Pricing
content: The current pricing is a €500 one-time installation fee, €50 per month for hosting, monitoring and updates, and a 10% success fee only on additional negotiated profit generated by Val.

title: Booking a Demo
content: Visitors can request a demonstration of Val to experience AI conversations, negotiation capabilities, business knowledge and appointment booking.

title: Acceptance of Terms
content: By using The Chain Technologies website or services, you agree to these Terms of Service and all applicable laws.

title: Customer Responsibilities
content: Customers are responsible for providing accurate information, complying with applicable laws, and using our services in a lawful manner.

title: Limitation of Liability
content: The Chain Technologies shall not be liable for indirect or consequential damages arising from the use of our services.

title: Changes to Terms of Service
content: We may update these Terms of Service as our products evolve. Continued use of our services constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
